remarks: Call this property home and enjoy year long views overlooking the private pond and panoramic back yard. This home comes complete with everything you need to enjoy the peace and quiet, or entertain with this open floor plan offering great space on the main level and lower level finished basement, complete with walkout to the back yard, fireplace, and full bath. My favorite part of the house is the 3 seasons room off the kitchen and the living room, which has great energy as a place to enjoy meals, or have your morning coffee and the look out over the peaceful surroundings of the home. House was fully updated with new kitchen and baths in recent years and offers a great living space. Current tenant in process of moving out. Will be fully out by the end of the month.
